provenance.normative_candidate: 2.0 First Draft - Complete Pre-Testnet Design Blueprint

rows.authority_boundary: Chain identity remains immutable; incompatible manifests, genesis hashes, profiles, or transaction indexes fail closed.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Chain and genesis manifests, chain IDs, protocol-profile hashes, tx-index hashes, and signed public-testnet commitments are checked before compatible operation.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Chain identity remains immutable; incompatible manifests, genesis hashes, profiles, or transaction indexes fail closed.
rows.title: Authority & chain Chain identity, manifests, and network compatibility

rows.authority_boundary: Mainnet uses one verified genesis account plus separately qualified role seeds, dynamic concurrence, expiry, challenge, and readiness gates; sole-validator mode is not BFT.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Current devnet/testnet bootstrap uses committed mode, founder/operator metadata, bounded PoH bootstrap policy, role schema, and bootstrap manifests.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Mainnet uses one verified genesis account plus separately qualified role seeds, dynamic concurrence, expiry, challenge, and readiness gates; sole-validator mode is not BFT.
rows.title: Authority & chain Genesis bootstrap and profile pinning

rows.authority_boundary: Active Constitution state, amendment history, lifetime challenge, remedies, and constitution-first activation must govern lower contracts.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Repository binds constitutional source/commitments and provides finalized-height procedure clocks.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Active Constitution state, amendment history, lifetime challenge, remedies, and constitution-first activation must govern lower contracts.
rows.title: Authority & chain Constitution commitment and constitutional clock

rows.authority_boundary: One authorized singular PDF, user-controlled publisher/recovery roots, threshold release signatures, succession, revocation, reproducible builds, provenance, and historical verification.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Signed seed registries, trust roots, release manifests, secret guards, and blocker reports exist; no final user publisher root is assigned.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: One authorized singular PDF, user-controlled publisher/recovery roots, threshold release signatures, succession, revocation, reproducible builds, provenance, and historical verification.
rows.title: Authority & chain Publication trust roots, package authority, and release evidence

rows.authority_boundary: Every current and target TX/MSG/SYS/RCP contract has exact IDs, schemas, authority, state, receipts, failures, replay, activation, API, and vectors.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: 236 append-only transaction types are indexed, schema-covered, and routed to exactly one domain applier.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Every current and target TX/MSG/SYS/RCP contract has exact IDs, schemas, authority, state, receipts, failures, replay, activation, API, and vectors.
rows.title: Execution Canonical transaction canon, schema, and dispatch

rows.authority_boundary: All admission behavior is profile-pinned, deterministic, replay-equivalent, and mapped to exact failure IDs and API responses.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Admission validates canonical type, schema, signature profile, signer/tier/role gates, public-only policy, and structural/byte limits.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: All admission behavior is profile-pinned, deterministic, replay-equivalent, and mapped to exact failure IDs and API responses.
rows.title: Execution Admission, signatures, gates, and payload bounds

rows.authority_boundary: TX identity, nonce consumption, duplicate behavior, and rejection/receipt semantics are exact per contract and stable across replay.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Transaction IDs are content-derived and chain-bound; account nonces are sequential at apply time; conflicting signer/nonce entries are rejected.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: TX identity, nonce consumption, duplicate behavior, and rejection/receipt semantics are exact per contract and stable across replay.
rows.title: Execution Transaction identity and account nonce progression

rows.authority_boundary: Local timing metadata never affects consensus; candidate selection is height-bound, canonical, resource-accounted, and identical across validators.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: SQLite-backed mempool supports canonical production ordering, TTL, height eligibility, duplicate detection, signer/type caps, pruning, and bounded eviction settings.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Local timing metadata never affects consensus; candidate selection is height-bound, canonical, resource-accounted, and identical across validators.
rows.title: Execution Persistent mempool and candidate ordering

rows.authority_boundary: Every contract declares exact reads, boundary writes, conflicts, ordering, parallel-safety, and serial-equivalence vectors.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Repository defines conflict keys, lanes, read/write sets, and deterministic ordering inputs for serial and helper paths.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Every contract declares exact reads, boundary writes, conflicts, ordering, parallel-safety, and serial-equivalence vectors.
rows.title: Execution Conflict lanes and read/write sets

rows.authority_boundary: Every validator derives the same candidate under active resource and SYS-priority rules; invalid blocks fail closed before state mutation.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Block builder selects canonical candidates; block admission revalidates transactions, BFT context, time, roots, and commitments.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Every validator derives the same candidate under active resource and SYS-priority rules; invalid blocks fail closed before state mutation.
rows.title: Execution Block candidate construction and admission

rows.authority_boundary: All consensus-relevant roots and profile/schema/parameter commitments are exact, mandatory, versioned, and independently replayable.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Blocks use content-addressed IDs/hashes and commit transaction, receipt, helper, recent-anchor, and state-root data.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: All consensus-relevant roots and profile/schema/parameter commitments are exact, mandatory, versioned, and independently replayable.
rows.title: Execution Block IDs, hashes, roots, and commitments

rows.authority_boundary: No partial state mutation on failure; restart and replay reproduce identical state, receipts, roots, and scheduler queues.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Executor applies canonical transactions atomically through a single-writer SQLite store with failpoints and rollback/error boundaries.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: No partial state mutation on failure; restart and replay reproduce identical state, receipts, roots, and scheduler queues.
rows.title: Execution Atomic application, single writer, and SQLite persistence

rows.authority_boundary: Historical SYSTEM transaction behavior remains replay-compatible, but new target scheduler work uses the separate SYS namespace and no user-signature fiction.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Current repository schedules receipt-only, parent-bound SYSTEM-origin transactions and enforces system flags/signers at admission/apply time.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Historical SYSTEM transaction behavior remains replay-compatible, but new target scheduler work uses the separate SYS namespace and no user-signature fiction.
rows.title: Execution Current SYSTEM transaction queue

rows.authority_boundary: All due SYS work is parent-derived, priority-ordered, idempotent, capacity-reserved, non-discretionary, and canonically receipted.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: defines due governance execution as mandatory at the first eligible finalized block after hold expiry.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: All due SYS work is parent-derived, priority-ordered, idempotent, capacity-reserved, non-discretionary, and canonically receipted.
rows.title: Execution Target deterministic SYS scheduling and priority

rows.authority_boundary: Every active schema/parameter/contract transition has deterministic migration and rollback-or-forward-repair vectors across fresh replay and restart.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Repository contains block replay, migration helpers, replay-consistency checks, restart journals, and state-root comparison tooling.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Every active schema/parameter/contract transition has deterministic migration and rollback-or-forward-repair vectors across fresh replay and restart.
rows.title: Execution Replay, migration, and restart consistency

rows.authority_boundary: Snapshots are acceleration only; finality, validator-set proof chains, schema/parameter roots, archive availability, and replay verification remain authoritative.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: State-sync services, snapshot anchors, cold-sync txs, peer catch-up, and provider checks exist with launch gates.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Snapshots are acceleration only; finality, validator-set proof chains, schema/parameter roots, archive availability, and replay verification remain authoritative.
rows.title: Execution Snapshots, state sync, cold sync, and archive retrieval

rows.authority_boundary: Integer per-contract and per-block units, bounded due-SYS reserve, deterministic backlog, safe pause, and profile commitments govern validity.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Current payload limits, block caps, mempool caps, helper limits, and runtime diagnostics exist, but the full target resource vector is not active.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Integer per-contract and per-block units, bounded due-SYS reserve, deterministic backlog, safe pause, and profile commitments govern validity.
rows.title: Execution Deterministic resource accounting and overload

rows.authority_boundary: Epoch-aware LogicalView, exact safe-runtime/bft_hotstuff.py; boundary node/lock/commit, persist-before-send, validator-set binding, and independent consensus review control public BFT.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Current BFT module defines deterministic sorted round-robin leaders, ceil(2n/3) quorums, proposal/vote/timeout signing payloads, QCs, TCs, and three-chain finality designation.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Epoch-aware LogicalView, exact safe-runtime/bft_hotstuff.py; boundary node/lock/commit, persist-before-send, validator-set binding, and independent consensus review control public BFT.
rows.title: Consensus & network HotStuff proposal, vote, QC, and TC

rows.authority_boundary: A validator must never double-vote/propose after restart; all safety slots persist before transmission and replay deterministically.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: BFT journals persist safety state and outbound messages; restart tests cover vote durability and retransmission behavior.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: A validator must never double-vote/propose after restart; all safety slots persist before transmission and replay deterministically.
rows.title: Consensus & network Consensus journals and outbound replay

rows.authority_boundary: Dependency fetch and pending-frontier processing are bounded, deterministic, stale-safe, epoch-bound, and denial-of-service resistant.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Repository tracks pending BFT objects, missing ancestors/QCs, fetch requests, and cached artifacts.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Dependency fetch and pending-frontier processing are bounded, deterministic, stale-safe, epoch-bound, and denial-of-service resistant.
rows.title: Consensus & network Pending frontier, fetch requests, and artifact cache

rows.authority_boundary: Exact LogicalView arithmetic, timeout backoff, NewView aggregation, epoch handoff, and old-set QC exception are canonical and externally reviewed.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Current tests/modules cover timeouts, TCs, catch-up, epoch binding, stale filtering, and restart liveness.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Exact LogicalView arithmetic, timeout backoff, NewView aggregation, epoch handoff, and old-set QC exception are canonical and externally reviewed.

rows.authority_boundary: Public activation requires independently controlled operators, role and key readiness, diversity, endpoint evidence, BFT tests, and activation receipts.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Repository implements validator registration/candidate/readiness txs, role opt-in, promotion scripts, readiness checks, and authority locks.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Public activation requires independently controlled operators, role and key readiness, diversity, endpoint evidence, BFT tests, and activation receipts.

rows.authority_boundary: Peers cannot gain authority from transport identity; compatibility checks remain fail-closed and independently reproducible.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Handshake binds peer/node identity to chain/genesis/profile commitments and rejects incompatible peers.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Peers cannot gain authority from transport identity; compatibility checks remain fail-closed and independently reproducible.
rows.title: Consensus & network Peer identity, handshake, and chain compatibility

rows.authority_boundary: Network hints and peer scores affect connectivity only, never civic authority or finalized truth; abuse controls are public and bounded.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Repository provides gossip/router/relay mechanics and canonical peer advertise, connect, rendezvous, reputation, and ban transaction families.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Network hints and peer scores affect connectivity only, never civic authority or finalized truth; abuse controls are public and bounded.
rows.title: Consensus & network Gossip, routing, relay, rendezvous, peer reputation, and bans

rows.authority_boundary: Transport encryption and reachability are service properties, not consensus authority; failures remain visible and recoverable.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Memory, TCP, TLS, relay, NAT/firewall, and endpoint diagnostics support local and external networking.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Transport encryption and reachability are service properties, not consensus authority; failures remain visible and recoverable.
rows.title: Consensus & network Transport implementations and NAT/TLS recovery

rows.authority_boundary: No named provider is trusted as protocol authority; bytes and endpoints are verified against user-controlled roots and finalized state. boundary
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Signed seed registries, trust roots, endpoint evidence, and chain commitments gate observer boot.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: No named provider is trusted as protocol authority; bytes and endpoints are verified against user-controlled roots and finalized state. boundary
rows.title: Consensus & network Provider-independent public discovery

rows.authority_boundary: Observer-local acceptance never equals finality; status must distinguish queued, forwarded, upstream accepted, included, finalized, rejected, and locally synced.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Observers are prevented from validator signing, may forward signed transactions upstream, persist an edge queue, reconcile confirmation, and sync state.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Observer-local acceptance never equals finality; status must distinguish queued, forwarded, upstream accepted, included, finalized, rejected, and locally synced.
rows.title: Consensus & network Observer authority lock, transaction forwarding, and reconciliation

rows.authority_boundary: Custody operations are purpose-bound, nonce-protected, replay-safe, recoverable, and exposed truthfully through API/frontend.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: Account registration, ML-DSA keys, secondary keys, one-node-device policy, browser/device records, session keys, and security policies are canonical transaction surfaces.
rows.primary_owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby-WeAll Protocol Maintainer
rows.production_target: Custody operations are purpose-bound, nonce-protected, replay-safe, recoverable, and exposed truthfully through API/frontend.

rows.authority_boundary: All restrictions require public reason, authority, due process, expiry/review where applicable, and restoration semantics.
rows.current_snapshot_behavior: SYSTEM actions can lock/unlock; reputation/sanction paths can ban/reinstate accounts with receipts.

rows.production_target: All restrictions require public reason, authority, due process, expiry/review where applicable, and restoration semantics.

rows.authority_boundary: Guardian recovery remains historical replay/migration only after the target routes activate; it is rejected for new Mainnet state.

rows.production_target: Guardian recovery remains historical replay/migration only after the target routes activate; it is rejected for new Mainnet state.

rows.authority_boundary: Transport failure is reported as transport failure, never as a civic result; no protocol-native private messaging authority is introduced.

truth_boundary: The exact uploaded v2.0 First Draft PDF is retained and hash-bound. Its extracted full-scope registers control W1 human-machine equality. Structural compiler coverage does not prove runtime correctness, independent review, interoperability, capacity, or production activation.
